frame_eqs_str: a['dec_med']=pow(0.9, div(30,a['fps'])); a['dec_slow']=pow(0.99, div(30,a['fps'])); a['beat']=Math.max(Math.max(a['bass'], a['mid']), a['treb']); a['avg']=((a['avg']*a['dec_slow'])+(a['beat']*(1-a['dec_slow']))); a['is_beat']=(above(a['beat'], ((0.5+a['avg'])+a['peak']))*above(a['time'], (a['t0']+0.2))); a['t0']=((a['is_beat']*a['time'])+((1-a['is_beat'])*a['t0'])); a['peak']=((a['is_beat']*a['beat'])+(((1-a['is_beat'])*a['peak'])*a['dec_med'])); a['x']=((Math.abs(a['is_beat'])>0.00001)?(((Math.floor(rand(60))*0.01)+0.2)):(a['x'])); a['y']=((Math.abs(a['is_beat'])>0.00001)?(((Math.floor(rand(60))*0.01)+0.2)):(a['y'])); a['q1']=a['x']; a['q2']=a['y']; a['q4']=a['aspectx']; a['q5']=a['aspecty']; a['wave_x']=a['q1']; a['wave_y']=(1-a['q2']);
